perPress.label: architecture-overview
perPress.answerPreview: **The Transformer**, basically, it's an encoder-decoder architecture built entirely on **self-attention** and **feed-forward layers**, with positional encodings to inject order. The thing it deliberately avoids is **recurrence and convolutions**, so no RNNs, no LSTMs, no CNNs for sequence modeling.
